name: Avrasya Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi Anonim Sirketi
summary: Avrasya Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi Anonim Sirketi operates in the real estate investment field in Turkey and Georgia. The company was formerly known as Avrasya Menkul Kiymetler Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. and changed its name to Avrasya Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi Anonim Sirketi in October 2010. Avrasya Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi Anonim Sirketi was founded in 1994 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.
